article_reference.note: Traceability references the published Molecular Omics article and the released PRIDE region tables.

derived.source_table_shared_proteoforms.article_location: Derived from exact accession+proteoform intersections in the released Tel2 and Teo2 tables; contrast with the article's published aggregate value of 35 shared proteoforms.
